hero.subtitle: Intelligent Scheduling
hero.title: AI-Powered Appointment Scheduling

features.title: Scheduling Features
features.subtitle: Smart Calendar Management
features.description: Advanced scheduling tools designed to maximize your practice efficiency and reduce administrative overhead.

items.title: Multi-Provider Scheduling
items.description: Manage schedules for multiple dentists, hygienists, and specialists in one unified calendar system.

items.title: Automated Reminders
items.description: Reduce no-shows with automated SMS and email reminders sent at optimal times before appointments.

items.title: Online Booking
items.description: Allow patients to book appointments online 24/7 with real-time availability and automatic confirmations.

items.title: Calendar Optimization
items.description: AI-powered calendar optimization that learns from your practice patterns to maximize efficiency.

showcase.title: Scheduling Success Stories
showcase.description: See how practices are transforming their scheduling operations

testimonials.author: Dr. Michael Chen
testimonials.quote: The AI-powered scheduling has completely eliminated our no-show problem. We save 10 hours per week on scheduling alone.
